result.stdout:
Usage: Kanyon [options]

Options:
  -c               Configuration
  -f               ManifestSource
  -v               Verbose
  --emit-crds      EmitCrds
  -p               PolicySetSource
  --policy-set     PolicySetName
  -h|-?|--help     IsHelpRequested
  -w|--wait        WaitAfterCompletion
  -e|--env-file    EnvFile
  -s|--source-env  Traverse the directory hierarchy to find any env files available
